business.name: Contractor/Handyman Services by Bill
business.tagline: From ceiling fans to kitchen guts — Bill handles it all

hero.headline: The guy your neighbors call when *everything* breaks at once
hero.subheadline: Ceiling fans, dock rebuilds, marble bathrooms — whatever's on your list, it gets done right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Whatever's broken, whatever needs building
services_section.subheading: From quick fixes to full renovations — one call handles it all

services.title: Kitchen Renovations
services.description: Complete gut jobs and beautiful rebuilds. New cabinets, countertops, flooring — we handle every detail from demo to final touches.

services.title: Bathroom Remodeling
services.description: Marble floors, double vanities, full tub and shower combos. Turn that cramped space into something you'll actually want to use.

services.title: Deck & Dock Repair
services.description: Major rebuilds and structural fixes that last. From planning to completion, we get your outdoor spaces back to perfect condition.

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: Ceiling fans, electrical issues, those random problems nobody else wants to touch. We show up with the right tools and get it sorted.

about.heading: Bill's been fixing Virginia Beach homes for years
about.body: When you call Bill, you're getting someone who actually cares about getting it right. Whether it's a quick ceiling fan fix or gutting your entire kitchen, the approach is the same — show up on time, do it right, and charge what's fair. Ask anyone who's worked with him.

reviews.name: Kathleen C.
reviews.text: This guy is awesome! Fixed my ceiling fan and tackled multiple other issues I couldn't find anyone else to handle. Great prices and so helpful.

reviews.name: Maria C.
reviews.text: Billy must be a bit OCD because everything was done to perfection. Beautiful marble bath with full tub, shower, and double sink vanity — incredible work.

reviews.name: Kevin Q.
reviews.text: Hired Bill for a major dock rebuild and he exceeded every expectation. Top-notch work from planning to completion, fair and transparent pricing.

reviews.name: Jean E.
reviews.text: Very prompt, professional, and did fantastic work on my deck. Would recommend Bill to anyone who needs work done around the house.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Virginia Beach and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local handyman services throughout Hampton Roads

cta.heading: Ready to get that project handled?
cta.body: From quick fixes to major renovations, Bill's got the tools and experience to get it done right. Fair pricing, quality work, no surprises.
